---
name: Wrong or missing rule
about: A rule is incorrect, incomplete, or missing from the skill
labels: content
---

**Which file contains the wrong/missing rule?**
- [ ] `reference.md`
- [ ] `workflows.md`
- [ ] `frameworks/tailwind.md`
- [ ] `frameworks/css.md`
- [ ] `frameworks/css-in-js.md`
- [ ] `frameworks/react-native.md`
- [ ] Not sure

**What is the current rule or behaviour?**
(quote the relevant section)

**What should it say instead?**
(include a correct code example if possible)

**Why is the current rule wrong?**
(browser behaviour, spec reference, real-world Arabic UI experience, etc.)

**Does this affect the test score?**
- [ ] Yes — an issue in `BadComponent.jsx` is now missed or incorrectly flagged
- [ ] No — it's a rule gap that isn't covered by the test component
